name: list_dids
description: List all VoIP.ms phone numbers (DIDs) available on this account. Use this first to discover which DIDs you own and which one is configured as the default for outbound SMS. Returns an array of DID objects with their numbers and default status. Takes no parameters.

name: send_sms
description: Send an SMS message from one of your VoIP.ms DIDs to a destination phone number. Use this to send outbound text messages. Do not use this to retrieve messages - use get_sms instead. The message is sent as plain text; multimedia (MMS) is not supported. Returns the API response indicating success or failure.

did.description: Source VoIP.ms phone number (DID) to send from. Must be one of your owned DIDs from list_dids. Format as e.g. '15551234567' (E.164 format without leading +).

dst.description: Destination phone number to receive the SMS. Format as e.g. '15557654321' (E.164 format without leading +). Do not use your own DID here - use the caller's number when replying.

message.description: Plain text message content to send. Maximum length is 160 characters for a single SMS segment. Longer messages may be split into multiple segments by the carrier.

name: get_sms
description: Retrieve SMS messages from the VoIP.ms API for a recent date range. Use this to fetch incoming messages or recent outbound messages. Do not use this to send messages - use send_sms instead. Returns an array of message objects with sender, recipient, message text, timestamp, and direction (inbound/outbound).

did.description: Filter by a specific VoIP.ms phone number (DID) to search. If omitted, returns messages for all DIDs on the account. Format as e.g. '15551234567' (E.164 format without leading +).

days.description: Number of days back from now to fetch messages. Default is 1 (last 24 hours). Maximum practical range is typically 30 days. Must be a positive integer.
